positive: A retro-futuristic, vibrant vector illustration of a chrome-plated cyberpunk geisha standing on a neon-lit rooftop overlooking a sprawling rainy megalopolis. Synthwave colors, deep blues and magentas, dramatic lighting, Japanese ukiyo-e influence, highly stylized.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, muted colors, organic shapes
